title: neottia repens
intro: Neottia repens, also known as the green adder's mouth or adder's tongue orchid, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the orchid family. Traditionally, Neottia repens has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation, and has been used to treat various health conditions. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as lowering blood pressure, reducing fever, and treating respiratory issues, among others. Neottia repens can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
